findings.description: _cache_opportunity_bg outside class body. Runtime NameError
DOGE in compliant_assets - unauthorized meme coin
VECHAIN ticker but all files use VET. VET/USDC fails checks
Missing LINK and IOTA from compliant_assets
K8s ConfigMap has ALL USDT pairs
Training results contain USDT pair data
Sync exchange.load_markets() blocks thread for seconds
Sync exchange.create_order() in async method
Sync json.load/dump blocks event loop on every trade
Deprecated get_event_loop + run_until_complete can deadlock
MockRiskManager approves ALL opportunities. No production guard prevents pipeline running with mock.
findings.recommendation: Add startup assertion refusing trade execution with MockRiskManager

findings.description: _execute_trade uses hardcoded $10k base_capital. Bypasses all RiskManager sizing. $300 account sizes 33x too large.
_execute_trade has no second risk gate. If MockRiskManager was used, zero risk checks on actual execution.
findings.recommendation: Add mandatory non-mockable risk validation inside _execute_trade

findings.description: Emergency stop uses position.current_price which may be stale. In a crisis, closes at wrong price.
findings.recommendation: Fetch live prices before emergency close

findings.description: RiskManager never updates max_drawdown. Always returns 0.0. Drawdown never checked as trading gate.
findings.recommendation: Implement real-time drawdown tracking like TradingRiskManager

findings.description: All POST mutation endpoints have ZERO authentication
Server binds 0.0.0.0 exposing all endpoints
execute_query accepts raw SQL with no parameterization
NO encryption for API keys anywhere in codebase
TradingRiskManager._kelly_criterion swaps parameter semantics: spread_pct passed as win_probability, confidence as win_amount. Kelly formula computes with wrong inputs.
findings.recommendation: Fix call site at line 712 to pass parameters in correct order

findings.description: base_capital hardcoded to $10,000 ignoring actual portfolio value. $300 account sizes positions as if $10k = 33x too large.
findings.recommendation: Read from config capital_allocation.initial_capital or RiskManager portfolio_value

findings.description: forward_windows dict missing 3 of 7 strategies (mean_reversion, pairs_arbitrage, momentum). Training crashes with KeyError.
findings.recommendation: Add MEAN_REVERSION:10, PAIRS_ARBITRAGE:20, MOMENTUM:48 to forward_windows

findings.description: Two risk manager classes with overlapping 830 lines
STRATEGY_MODELS duplicated, only 4 of 7 strategies
130 lines feature engineering copy-pasted
MiCA whitelist in 5 files with inconsistent contents
sys.path.insert in 12 files. No proper package structure
Mutable singletons not thread-safe
BTC/USDC and ETH/USDC enabled. Flagged for personal deployment
_ASSET_CONFIGS missing 5 pairs: LINK,IOTA,VET,XDC,ONDO
WebSocket pairs missing XDC/USDC and ONDO/USDC
Test asserts DOGE/USDC is compliant. Wrong.
1s sleep after every order. Unacceptable for arbitrage
_dedup_cache grows without bound
Global lock serializes ALL inference
Single-sample inference. Batch params declared but unused
All _load_json sync in async handlers
Kelly cap 25% in RiskManager vs 10% in TradingRiskManager. Wrong class = 2.5x larger positions.
findings.recommendation: Unify Kelly cap. Recommend 5% for MICRO tier

findings.description: No per-trade maximum loss limit. Only portfolio-level. No guard saying never lose more than $X.
Partial fills treated as success (95% assumed). Remainder never cancelled, never tracked.
If buy fills but sell fails, cancel may be impossible. Leaves unhedged directional exposure.
findings.recommendation: Attempt market sell to unwind. Log as critical risk event

findings.description: OrderExecutor accepts risk_manager but NEVER calls it. Field stored, never referenced.
DynamicRiskAdjustment not wired into pipeline. VaR thresholds and circuit breakers are dead code.
VaR and Expected Shortfall never consulted during trade decisions. Dead code in execution path.
findings.recommendation: Wire VaR limits into trade execution gate

findings.description: record_trade can drive current_capital below zero. No floor check. Negative allocations possible.
findings.recommendation: Add minimum capital floor ($50). Halt trading below floor

findings.description: Rate limiting missing (TODO). Vulnerable to DoS
WebSocket /ws has no auth. Leaks portfolio data
api_key stored as plain instance attribute
Ticker parsers trust remote data types. NaN/Inf propagate
Flat 0.1% fee assumption for profitability check. Coinbase is 0.6% taker. 0.3% spread passes validation but loses money on Coinbase.
PaperTradingExecutor uses flat 0.1% fee. Real Coinbase fees are 6x higher. Paper results overly optimistic.
RiskManager Kelly inflates win_probability with spread_bonus and uses spread/costs as odds ratio producing unreasonably high fractions.
findings.recommendation: Use historical win rate data for probability estimation

findings.description: Paper trading hardcodes 4-strategy weights {arb:0.4,fib:0.2,grid:0.2,dca:0.2} vs config 7-strategy weights. Inconsistent.
STRATEGIES list only has 4 strategies, missing mean_reversion, pairs_arbitrage, momentum.
calculate_kelly_metrics EV formula dimensionally inconsistent. Does not account for actual dollar amounts at risk.
PaperTrading super().__init__ tries load_markets with empty configs
predict() no shape validation on input
last_updated hardcoded 2024-01-01
RSI/EMA/BB use Python loops. 10-100x slower than numpy
No portfolio-level circuit breaker. Multiple strategies at 4.9% each = 15%+ portfolio drawdown with no trigger.
findings.recommendation: Add aggregate portfolio drawdown circuit breaker at 8%

findings.description: Quarterly rebalance resets ALL circuit breakers unconditionally. No recovery evidence required.
findings.recommendation: Only reset if strategy shows positive P&L in last 7 days

findings.description: Daily loss check uses abs() - triggers on large GAINS too. Logic bug.
TradingRiskManager emergency_stop uses 0.1% slippage. In crash, slippage is 2-10%.
Defaults to $10k capital ignoring config $300. min_diversification=5 impractical for $300.
findings.recommendation: Read from config, reduce to 2-3 for MICRO tier

findings.description: Paper trading uses own hardcoded risk constants. Not testing same risk path as live.
Paper sizing = MAX_POSITION_PCT * magnitude * confidence. Ignores Kelly entirely.
findings.recommendation: Use unified position sizing through risk layer

findings.description: Wildcard methods/headers with credentials=True
No TLS/HTTPS configuration
check_stop_losses only handles buy-side. Sell positions stop/TP logic is inverted but not implemented.
findings.recommendation: Add side-aware stop loss matching TradingRiskManager

findings.description: Fee calc uses flat 0.1% for both exchanges. Real exchange fees differ significantly.
Partial fill hardcoded to 95%. Creates quantity mismatch between arb legs.
findings.recommendation: Check actual filled qty and adjust other leg

findings.description: rolling_sharpe uses sqrt(N trades) annualization instead of time-based. Incomparable across strategies.
Sharpe ratio mixes per-trade returns with daily risk-free rate adjustments.
findings.recommendation: Match return frequency with risk-free rate period

findings.description: CrossExchangeScorer recomputes signals as simple average, losing confidence-weighted info.
Stale TODO for rate limiting
Singleton get_risk_manager() has no locking. Race conditions possible.
Symmetric 0.1% slippage model. Real slippage is asymmetric.
Min position check uses 0.001*avg_price regardless of pair. XRP min = $0.0005, effectively none.
Two risk manager classes with different defaults, Kelly caps, drawdown logic, APIs.
Two separate RiskManager classes with different Kelly, stop-loss, fee assumptions. Pipeline uses one, backtester the other.
min_spread_threshold=0.5 (50%) seems wrong. Should be 0.005 (0.5%)?
risk/reward ratio inverted: stop_loss=2%, take_profit=1%. Risk 2x of reward.

summary: Synthesized 6 agent reports. Total findings: 82 (22 critical, 33 high, 19 medium). Overall health score: 38/100. Cross-cutting issues in 12 files flagged by multiple agents.
recommendations: Multi-agent concern: src/ flagged by duplication, sys_path
Multi-agent concern: src/capital_allocator.py flagged by drawdown, limits, rounding
Multi-agent concern: src/compliance.py flagged by inconsistency, stale, usdt
Multi-agent concern: src/dashboard_api.py flagged by auth, blocking_io, cors, exposure
Multi-agent concern: src/data_integration_service.py flagged by async, inconsistency
Multi-agent concern: src/live_arbitrage_pipeline.py flagged by blocking_io, bypass, fees, hardcoded, memory, mock, organization
Multi-agent concern: src/multi_strategy_training.py flagged by consistency, vectorization
Multi-agent concern: src/order_executor.py flagged by async, blocking_io, bypass, correlation, error_handling, fees, limits, slippage
Multi-agent concern: src/paper_trading.py flagged by bypass, consistency, duplication, kelly
Multi-agent concern: src/realtime_inference.py flagged by async, caching
Multi-agent concern: src/risk_management.py flagged by consistency, drawdown, duplication, emergency, inconsistency, kelly, limits, rounding, singleton
Multi-agent concern: src/strategy_ensemble.py flagged by consistency, types
